---
title: Civilization and Its Discontents
author: Sigmund Freud
date: '2025-11-01'
categories:
- Philosophy
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★
rating: 3
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# Modern Classics Civilization and Its Discontent

## Reading Notes





## Reading Journey

- 2025-11-01: Started
